title: cynometra schefferi
intro: Cynometra schefferi, also known as the Philippine ironwood or iron tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Cynometra schefferi include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving blood circulation, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Cynometra schefferi include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
